title: Oven Roasted Spatchcock Chicken with Herbs
time: Prep: 20 min | Cook: 60 min | Total: 80 min
bodyHtml:
Time: 80 mins
Style: Oven Roasted

Ingredients

  • 1 whole Chicken (3-4 lbs, spatchcocked)
  • 2 whole Lemons
  • 1/4 cup Garlic-infused Olive Oil
  • Fresh Rosemary, Thyme, and Parsley
  • Sea Salt

Step-by-Step Instructions

Position chicken breast side down and cut out backbone. Flip and flatten (spatchcock).
Rub with infused oil and salt. Squeeze one lemon over the skin.
Arrange chicken in a pan with lemon slices and fresh herb sprigs tucked around it.
Roast at 400°F for 55-60 mins until internal temp is 165°F.
Serve with roasted lemons and pan drippings.

Portioning Guide (Cooked)

Alexander: 1/2 chicken. Hanna: 1/4 chicken.
